summary: Sprint 3 frontend visual redesign testing. All UI elements verified via Playwright and computed style checks.

issues: html, body, #root selector sets background-color: #0D0D0D but body overrides to #FFFFFF. Minor conflict but body wins so visual is correct.

critical_code_review_comments: index.css has conflicting background rules: 'html, body, #root { background-color: #0D0D0D }' and 'body { background-color: #FFFFFF }'. The body rule wins but the html/#root may flash dark on slow loads. Consider aligning them to #FFFFFF.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 visual redesign fully passing. All chip colors, header, stoplight dots, footer, boot sequence, and commands verified.

test_results.whoami_chip_purple: PASS - rgb(127,122,255) bg, white text, 8px radius
test_results.log_chip_yellow: PASS - rgb(255,214,50) bg, dark text, 8px radius
test_results.status_chip_pink: PASS - rgb(243,121,172) bg, white text, 8px radius
test_results.commands_work: PASS - whoami, log, status, clear, help all working
